name: Golf VX Duluth
address: 3330 Satellite Blvd NW Suit 1, Duluth, GA 30096
about: Golf VX Duluth is an indoor golf simulator venue in Gwinnett County, Georgia, featuring 11 climate-controlled bays with T2 Simulators. The venue offers hourly bookings for solo or group play, alongside memberships, leagues, tournaments, and PGA-certified golf lessons. It operates as a full-service golf lounge with a restaurant and bar, providing an all-season golfing experience. The facility emphasizes advanced technology with zero-lag simulators, moving swing plates, and access to over 380 global golf courses. Its target audience includes casual players, serious golfers, and event groups, with a focus on accessibility and year-round play regardless of weather conditions.
why_golfers_like_it: Zero-lag T2 simulators with 380+ global courses
PGA-certified lessons with advanced swing analysis
Spacious, climate-controlled bays for year-round play
Full restaurant and bar with signature cocktails
Flexible hourly bookings and membership options

food_and_drink.notes: Full restaurant menu with delicious food available
Signature cocktails and full bar service

simulator_software: T2 Simulator (380+ world-class golf courses, zero-lag technology)

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The venue provides club rentals, but golfers are welcome to bring their own equipment.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Outside food and drinks are not allowed; the venue offers a full restaurant and bar.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: An 18-hole round usually takes about an hour per player; group times may vary.

faq.question: Is this venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue offers junior golf lessons and is family-friendly with options for all ages.
